raw_consumer_statement: On my credit card statement, a charge for almost {$300.00} for XXXX XXXX was on there. I disputed it. I did not make that purchase at all and dont have a XXXX. I thought it would be open and shut once they reached out but no, XXXX XXXX sent a phony pdf that says I picked up a guitar and I 100 % did NOT. Citi refuses to reverse it. I want proof I picked up a guitar like they said. I want my credit back, I did not make nor authorize that purchase.
